LanguageData.ELIFMH-6LBTransport.label: MH-6M Little Bird (Transport)
LanguageData.ELIFMH-6LBTransport.description: DESCRIPTION: The MH-6M is a helicopter designed for general small range transport of goods and personnel. BASIC STATS: Health: 500 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 400kg Speed: 5 Passenger Capacity: 1-4 Fuel Per Tile: 5 Fuel Capacity: 300 Round Trip Range: 30 Full Range: 60 Internal Power: 500w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: n/a Precision Run Capacity: n/a Spread: n/a Distance between drops: n/a
